---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("data/macro_merged_clean.csv", parse_dates=["date"]).set_index("date")

# 1. Construct term spread

df["termspread"] = df["gs10"] - df["tb3ms"]

# 2. Lag features
lags = [1, 3, 6]
for col in ["unrate", "cpi", "indpro", "gs10", "tb3ms", "termspread"]:
    for L in lags:
        df[f"{col}_lag{L}"] = df[col].shift(L)


# 3. Growth rates / changes

df["unrate_change"] = df["unrate"].diff()
df["indpro_growth"] = df["indpro"].pct_change()
df["cpi_yoy"] = df["cpi"].pct_change(12)
df["gs10_change"] = df["gs10"].diff()
df["tb3ms_change"] = df["tb3ms"].diff()
df["termspread_change"] = df["termspread"].diff()


# 4. Moving averages

for win in [3, 6]:
    df[f"unrate_ma{win}"] = df["unrate"].rolling(win).mean()
    df[f"indpro_ma{win}"] = df["indpro"].rolling(win).mean()


# 5. Momentum features

df["unrate_momentum"] = df["unrate"] - df["unrate_ma3"]
df["indpro_momentum"] = df["indpro"] - df["indpro_ma3"]


# Final clean dataset

df_features = df.dropna()
df_features.to_csv("data/macro_features.csv")

```
